title: Classic Glint
description: Brings back the old enchantment glint from 1.19.3!
body:
![Comparison](https://imgur.com/ow4Ugm5.png) [![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-glint) [![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/classic-glint) > #### Classic Glint brings back the old enchantment glint from 1.19.3 that is vibrant and actually visible to see!
### Suggested Settings For an accurate representation of the old enchantment glint, apply the following changes to your settings: ![Suggested Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b66fe1a2c0c8133abcf110183af7359b23d14f05.png)
